key_risks: Hawkish FOMC surprise on June 17 reversing yield decline
Headline CPI re-acceleration via energy weighing on sentiment

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum (+8.8% 7d), AI infrastructure demand, cooling core CPI supports growth multiples.
Yields falling sharply (2Y -8bp, 10Y -10bp), dovish FOMC hold expected, small caps benefit most from rate relief.
Persistent factor leadership (+5.85% 7d), benign vol regime with VIX at 17.7.
Steepening curve, falling short rates, strong recent momentum into FOMC.
Semiconductor supply chain leverage, strong trend, weaker USD supportive.

portfolio_rationale: Cooler core CPI and falling yields ahead of June 17 FOMC favor rate-sensitive and growth-tilted equities. Tilt toward semis/momentum with small-cap and regional bank exposure to capture domestic rate-relief beta.
rationale_summary: Disinflationary core CPI print plus dovish FOMC hold setup with falling yields supports growth, semis, small caps, and regional banks for the week.
